Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigShoppingFrameMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigShoppingAltFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.AlwaysLoadMore:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ListMissingTerms, "BOTTOMLEFT")
